nasb.text: which He brought about in Christ, when He raised Him from the dead and seated Him at His right hand in the heavenly places,

esv.text: that he worked in Christ when he raised him from the dead and seated him at his right hand in the heavenly places,

cnv.text: 這力量運行在基督身上，使他從死人中復活，並且在天上坐在自己的右邊，

ccb.text: 上帝曾用这大能使基督从死里复活，使基督在天上坐在自己右边，

csbs.text: 神曾将这能力运作在基督的身上，使基督从死人中复活，并且使他在天上坐在自己的右边，
